metadata.title: Comprehensive Terror Intelligence Analysis Database
sources: Armed Conflict Location & Event Data Project (ACLED)
US State Department Foreign Terrorist Organizations List

threat_level_scale.Critical: Active, large-scale terrorism with frequent mass-casualty attacks
threat_level_scale.High: Significant terror activity with recurring attacks
threat_level_scale.Elevated: Periodic attacks or credible ongoing threats
threat_level_scale.Moderate: Occasional incidents or latent threat presence

countries.name: Afghanistan
countries.sub_region: Central/South Asia overlap - often grouped with MENA in terror analysis

countries.name: Libya
active_threat_groups: Al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb (AQIM) elements

countries.name: Palestinian Territories
active_threat_groups: Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine (PFLP)

countries.name: Nigeria
active_threat_groups: Boko Haram (Jama'atu Ahlis Sunna Lidda'awati wal-Jihad - JAS)
Indigenous People of Biafra (IPOB)/Eastern Security Network

countries.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
active_threat_groups: Cooperative for the Development of the Congo (CODECO)
Forces Démocratiques de Libération du Rwanda (FDLR)

countries.name: Mozambique
active_threat_groups: Ansar al-Sunna (ISIS-Mozambique / Ahlu Sunnah Wa-Jama / Al-Shabaab Mozambique)

countries.name: Chad
active_threat_groups: Front for Change and Concord in Chad (FACT)

countries.name: Togo
conflict_zones: Savanes Region (northern border with Burkina Faso)

countries.name: Senegal
active_threat_groups: Movement of Democratic Forces of Casamance (MFDC)

countries.name: Burundi
active_threat_groups: Résistance pour un État de Droit (RED)

countries.name: Angola
active_threat_groups: Front for the Liberation of the Enclave of Cabinda (FLEC)

countries.name: Philippines
active_threat_groups: Communist Party of the Philippines/New People's Army (CPP/NPA)

countries.name: Myanmar
active_threat_groups: People's Defence Force (PDF) / National Unity Government (NUG)

countries.name: Uzbekistan
active_threat_groups: Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan (IMU) - largely displaced

countries.name: Russia
active_threat_groups: Freedom of Russia Legion/Russian Volunteer Corps (anti-Kremlin)

countries.name: Mexico
active_threat_groups: Zapatista Army of National Liberation (EZLN) - low level
Various smaller cartels and armed groups

countries.name: Colombia
active_threat_groups: FARC dissident factions (Estado Mayor Central, Segunda Marquetalia)
Clan del Golfo (Autodefensas Gaitanistas de Colombia - AGC)

countries.name: Peru
active_threat_groups: Sendero Luminoso (Shining Path) remnants / Militarized Communist Party of Peru (MPCP)
conflict_zones: VRAEM (Valley of the Apurímac, Ene, and Mantaro Rivers)

countries.name: Haiti
active_threat_groups: G9 Family and Allies (Viv Ansanm coalition)

attack_type_taxonomy.description: Comprehensive attack type classification aligned with ACLED and GTD standards

sub_categories.name: Firearms Attack
sub_categories.description: Armed attack using firearms (rifles, pistols, machine guns) against people
sub_categories.example: Al-Shabaab armed assault on Mogadishu hotel complex

sub_categories.name: Armed Ambush
sub_categories.description: Surprise armed attack on moving targets, typically convoys or patrols
sub_categories.example: JNIM ambush on military convoy in Mali

sub_categories.name: Armed Raid / Overrun
sub_categories.description: Coordinated armed assault to seize or destroy a fixed position, base, or settlement
sub_categories.example: ISWAP overrun of military base in northeast Nigeria

sub_categories.name: Drive-by Shooting
sub_categories.description: Shooting conducted from a moving vehicle targeting individuals or locations
sub_categories.example: Targeted assassination of official via drive-by in Kabul

sub_categories.name: Improvised Explosive Device (IED)
sub_categories.description: Detonation of a concealed or emplaced explosive device
sub_categories.example: IED detonation targeting police patrol in Mogadishu

sub_categories.name: Vehicle-Borne IED (VBIED)
sub_categories.description: Explosive-laden vehicle driven to target and detonated
sub_categories.example: VBIED attack on government checkpoint in Baghdad

sub_categories.name: Suicide Bombing (Person-Borne)
sub_categories.description: Individual wearing explosive vest/belt detonates among targets
sub_categories.example: ISIS suicide bomber at Kabul airport

sub_categories.name: Suicide Vehicle Bombing (SVBIED)
sub_categories.description: Suicide operative drives explosive-laden vehicle into target
sub_categories.example: Al-Shabaab SVBIED at Mogadishu intersection

sub_categories.name: Landmine
sub_categories.description: Detonation of anti-personnel or anti-vehicle mine
sub_categories.example: Landmine detonation killing civilians in rural Syria

sub_categories.name: Grenade Attack
sub_categories.description: Throwing or launching of grenades at targets
sub_categories.example: Grenade thrown at police station in Nairobi

sub_categories.name: Mortar / Rocket / Artillery
sub_categories.description: Indirect fire attack using mortars, rockets, or artillery
sub_categories.example: Rocket attack on Green Zone, Baghdad

sub_categories.name: Drone/UAV Attack
sub_categories.description: Attack using unmanned aerial vehicles carrying explosives or used as guided munitions
sub_categories.example: Houthi drone attack on Saudi Arabian oil facility

sub_categories.name: Letter/Package Bomb
sub_categories.description: Explosive device concealed in mail or package
sub_categories.example: Package bombs sent to Greek government officials

sub_categories.name: Targeted Shooting
sub_categories.description: Deliberate killing of specific individual(s) using firearms
sub_categories.example: Assassination of tribal elder by ISIS gunmen in Iraq

sub_categories.name: Targeted Bombing
sub_categories.description: Use of explosive device to kill specific individual(s)
sub_categories.example: Magnetic IED attached to vehicle of Afghan government official

sub_categories.name: Stabbing / Bladed Attack
sub_categories.description: Use of knife or bladed weapon to kill targeted individual
sub_categories.example: Knife assassination of police officer in France

sub_categories.name: Poisoning
sub_categories.description: Use of poison or toxic substance to kill specific individual
sub_categories.example: Poisoning of opposition figure using nerve agent

sub_categories.name: Kidnapping for Ransom
sub_categories.description: Abduction of individual(s) with demand for ransom payment
sub_categories.example: Boko Haram kidnapping of schoolchildren in northeast Nigeria

sub_categories.name: Hostage Barricade
sub_categories.description: Seizure of location with hostages to create standoff
sub_categories.example: Al-Shabaab siege of Dusit D2 hotel complex in Nairobi

sub_categories.name: Hijacking
sub_categories.description: Seizure of vehicle, aircraft, or vessel with passengers/crew
sub_categories.example: Somali pirates hijacking commercial vessel in Gulf of Aden

sub_categories.name: Mass Abduction
sub_categories.description: Large-scale kidnapping operation targeting groups (students, villagers, etc.)
sub_categories.example: Mass kidnapping of students from school in northwest Nigeria

sub_categories.name: Arson
sub_categories.description: Deliberate setting of fire to destroy property or infrastructure
sub_categories.example: Arson attack on government building in Burkina Faso

sub_categories.name: Sabotage
sub_categories.description: Deliberate destruction or damage to critical infrastructure
sub_categories.example: Pipeline sabotage by militants in Niger Delta

sub_categories.name: Cyberattack
sub_categories.description: Attack on digital infrastructure, networks, or systems for terror purposes
sub_categories.example: Cyber disruption of critical infrastructure by state-sponsored actors

sub_categories.name: Vehicle Ramming Attack
sub_categories.description: Deliberate driving of vehicle into crowds or targets
sub_categories.example: Vehicle ramming attack on Christmas market in Berlin

sub_categories.name: Stabbing Spree
sub_categories.description: Mass attack using bladed weapons in public
sub_categories.example: Mass stabbing attack at train station in Kunming, China

sub_categories.name: Blunt Force Attack
sub_categories.description: Attack using blunt instruments
sub_categories.example: Hammer attack on police officer

sub_categories.name: Chemical Attack
sub_categories.description: Use of chemical weapons or toxic industrial chemicals
sub_categories.example: Sarin gas attack in Ghouta, Syria

sub_categories.name: Biological Attack
sub_categories.description: Deliberate release of biological agents to cause harm
sub_categories.example: Anthrax letter attacks in the United States (2001)

sub_categories.name: Radiological Attack (Dirty Bomb)
sub_categories.description: Dispersal of radioactive material using conventional explosives
sub_categories.example: No major successful attack; multiple disrupted plots

sub_categories.name: Nuclear Attack
sub_categories.description: Detonation of nuclear device or improvised nuclear device
sub_categories.example: No terrorist nuclear attack has occurred; theoretical threat

sub_categories.name: Complex Coordinated Attack
sub_categories.description: Multi-method or multi-site simultaneous/sequential attack
sub_categories.example: Mumbai 2008 attacks (armed assault + bombing + hostage)

sub_categories.name: Swarm Attack
sub_categories.description: Multiple simultaneous drone or small-unit attacks from different vectors
sub_categories.example: Multi-drone attack on military installations

target_type_taxonomy.description: Comprehensive target type classification aligned with GTD and ACLED standards

sub_categories.name: Government Officials / Politicians
sub_categories.description: Elected officials, political leaders, government administrators

sub_categories.name: Government Buildings / Institutions
sub_categories.description: Parliament, ministries, courthouses, government offices

sub_categories.name: Judiciary / Legal System
sub_categories.description: Judges, prosecutors, lawyers, courtrooms

sub_categories.name: Election Infrastructure
sub_categories.description: Polling stations, electoral commissions, ballot transport

sub_categories.name: Military Personnel
sub_categories.description: Active duty military members, reserves, veterans (targeted as military)

sub_categories.name: Military Installations / Bases
sub_categories.description: Military camps, barracks, bases, checkpoints

sub_categories.name: Military Convoys / Patrols
sub_categories.description: Moving military formations, patrol routes

sub_categories.name: Military Equipment / Assets
sub_categories.description: Vehicles, aircraft, weapons depots, communication systems

sub_categories.name: Paramilitary / Militia Forces
sub_categories.description: State-aligned paramilitary forces, national guard

sub_categories.name: Police Personnel
sub_categories.description: Police officers, investigators, counter-terrorism units

sub_categories.name: Police Stations / Facilities
sub_categories.description: Police headquarters, stations, detention facilities

sub_categories.name: Police Vehicles / Patrols
sub_categories.description: Patrol cars, armored vehicles, police checkpoints

sub_categories.name: Intelligence / Security Services
sub_categories.description: Intelligence operatives, security service buildings

sub_categories.name: Civilians (General)
sub_categories.description: Indiscriminate attacks on civilian population

sub_categories.name: Marketplaces / Commercial Areas
sub_categories.description: Markets, shopping centers, bazaars, commercial districts

sub_categories.name: Residential Areas
sub_categories.description: Homes, apartments, villages, refugee camps

sub_categories.name: Public Gatherings / Events
sub_categories.description: Festivals, concerts, sporting events, protests

sub_categories.name: Funeral / Wedding Gatherings
sub_categories.description: Funeral processions, wedding celebrations, social gatherings

sub_categories.name: Energy Infrastructure
sub_categories.description: Power plants, pipelines, oil/gas facilities, electrical grid

sub_categories.name: Water Infrastructure
sub_categories.description: Water treatment, dams, irrigation systems, reservoirs

sub_categories.name: Telecommunications
sub_categories.description: Cell towers, internet infrastructure, broadcast facilities

sub_categories.name: Financial Infrastructure
sub_categories.description: Banks, ATMs, stock exchanges, financial data centers

sub_categories.name: Aviation
sub_categories.description: Airports, aircraft, air traffic control

sub_categories.name: Maritime / Port
sub_categories.description: Ships, ports, harbors, naval vessels

sub_categories.name: Rail / Metro
sub_categories.description: Trains, rail stations, metro systems, rail infrastructure

sub_categories.name: Road / Bus
sub_categories.description: Buses, bus stations, highways, bridges, tunnels

sub_categories.name: Supply Chain / Logistics
sub_categories.description: Cargo facilities, supply depots, logistics hubs

sub_categories.name: Mosques / Islamic Sites
sub_categories.description: Mosques, madrassas, Islamic shrines

sub_categories.name: Churches / Christian Sites
sub_categories.description: Churches, cathedrals, Christian institutions

sub_categories.name: Synagogues / Jewish Sites
sub_categories.description: Synagogues, Jewish community centers, Jewish cemeteries

sub_categories.name: Hindu / Sikh / Buddhist Temples
sub_categories.description: Temples, gurdwaras, monasteries

sub_categories.name: Religious Figures / Clergy
sub_categories.description: Imams, priests, rabbis, religious leaders

sub_categories.name: Religious Processions / Gatherings
sub_categories.description: Pilgrimages, religious festivals, prayer gatherings

sub_categories.name: Schools (Primary/Secondary)
sub_categories.description: Schools, schoolchildren, teachers

sub_categories.name: Universities / Higher Education
sub_categories.description: University campuses, students, professors

sub_categories.name: Educational Administrators / Officials
sub_categories.description: School administrators, education ministry staff

sub_categories.name: Journalists / Reporters
sub_categories.description: Print, broadcast, and online journalists

sub_categories.name: Media Offices / Facilities
sub_categories.description: Newspaper offices, TV stations, radio stations

sub_categories.name: Social Media / Online Platforms
sub_categories.description: Cyberattacks on online media, targeted harassment campaigns

sub_categories.name: United Nations Facilities / Personnel
sub_categories.description: UN offices, peacekeepers, UN staff

sub_categories.name: Embassies / Consulates
sub_categories.description: Diplomatic missions, consular offices

sub_categories.name: Diplomatic Personnel
sub_categories.description: Ambassadors, diplomats, diplomatic staff

sub_categories.name: International Organizations
sub_categories.description: World Bank, IMF, ICRC, WHO, and similar organizations

sub_categories.name: Humanitarian Aid Workers
sub_categories.description: NGO personnel, aid workers, volunteers

sub_categories.name: Humanitarian Facilities
sub_categories.description: Aid warehouses, refugee camps, humanitarian compounds

sub_categories.name: Medical / Healthcare
sub_categories.description: Hospitals, clinics, medical personnel, ambulances

sub_categories.name: Multinational Corporations
sub_categories.description: International company offices, staff, assets

sub_categories.name: Local Businesses
sub_categories.description: Small businesses, shops, restaurants, hotels

sub_categories.name: Tourism / Hospitality
sub_categories.description: Hotels, tourist sites, restaurants, entertainment venues

sub_categories.name: Extractive Industry
sub_categories.description: Mining operations, oil/gas workers, resource extraction sites

sub_categories.name: Ethnic / Tribal Groups
sub_categories.description: Targeted ethnic, tribal, or clan communities

sub_categories.name: Sectarian Targets
sub_categories.description: Shia, Sunni, or other sect-specific targeting

sub_categories.name: Minority Communities
sub_categories.description: Ethnic, religious, or sexual minorities specifically targeted

weapon_type_taxonomy.description: Comprehensive weapon type classification for terror intelligence analysis

sub_categories.name: Improvised Explosive Device (IED)
sub_categories.description: Homemade explosive device, often using military or commercial explosives with improvised detonation mechanism

sub_categories.name: Vehicle-Borne IED (VBIED)
sub_categories.description: IED placed in or on a vehicle for delivery to target

sub_categories.name: Suicide Vest / Belt (SVEST / PBIED)
sub_categories.description: Body-worn explosive device detonated by the wearer

sub_categories.name: Suicide Vehicle-Borne IED (SVBIED)
sub_categories.description: Vehicle-borne IED driven by suicide operative into target

sub_categories.name: Landmine
sub_categories.description: Explosive device placed under or on ground, detonated by pressure, proximity, or command

sub_categories.name: Hand Grenade
sub_categories.description: Handheld explosive device thrown at targets

sub_categories.name: Rocket-Propelled Grenade (RPG)
sub_categories.description: Shoulder-launched anti-armor or anti-personnel weapon

sub_categories.name: Mortar
sub_categories.description: Indirect fire weapon launching explosive shells in high arc

sub_categories.name: Rocket / Missile
sub_categories.description: Self-propelled munition fired at targets

sub_categories.name: Letter / Package Bomb
sub_categories.description: Small explosive device concealed in mail or package

sub_categories.name: Drone / UAV-Borne Explosive
sub_categories.description: Unmanned aerial vehicle carrying or constituting an explosive payload
variants: Modified commercial drone with dropped munition

sub_categories.name: Assault Rifle
sub_categories.description: Selective-fire rifle firing intermediate cartridge

sub_categories.name: Machine Gun
sub_categories.description: Fully automatic weapon for sustained fire

sub_categories.name: Submachine Gun
sub_categories.description: Compact automatic weapon firing pistol cartridge

sub_categories.name: Handgun / Pistol
sub_categories.description: Short-barreled firearm designed for one-hand use

sub_categories.name: Sniper / Precision Rifle
sub_categories.description: Scoped rifle for long-range precision shooting

sub_categories.name: Shotgun
sub_categories.description: Smoothbore firearm firing multiple projectiles

sub_categories.name: Craft-Produced / Improvised Firearm
sub_categories.description: Locally manufactured or modified firearm

sub_categories.name: Molotov Cocktail
sub_categories.description: Improvised incendiary device using flammable liquid in glass bottle

sub_categories.name: Incendiary Device
sub_categories.description: Purpose-built device designed to start fires

sub_categories.name: Arson Materials
sub_categories.description: Accelerants and materials used for deliberate fire-setting

sub_categories.name: Chemical Weapon Agent
sub_categories.description: Toxic chemical substance designed to cause death or harm

sub_categories.name: Biological Agent
sub_categories.description: Pathogen or toxin used as weapon

sub_categories.name: Radiological Material
sub_categories.description: Radioactive material used to contaminate area or population

sub_categories.name: Nuclear Device
sub_categories.description: Nuclear explosive device or improvised nuclear device

sub_categories.name: Ramming Vehicle
sub_categories.description: Motor vehicle used deliberately as impact weapon against people or structures
sub_categories.notes: Distinct from VBIED - no explosive payload; vehicle itself is the weapon

sub_categories.name: Knife / Dagger
sub_categories.description: Short-bladed weapon used in close-quarters attack

sub_categories.name: Machete / Cleaver
sub_categories.description: Large bladed implement used as weapon

sub_categories.name: Axe / Hatchet
sub_categories.description: Chopping tool used as weapon

sub_categories.name: Sword / Large Blade
sub_categories.description: Large edged weapon

sub_categories.name: Blunt Instrument
sub_categories.description: Non-edged impact weapon

sub_categories.name: Malware / Ransomware
sub_categories.description: Malicious software designed to disrupt, damage, or gain unauthorized access

sub_categories.name: Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS)
sub_categories.description: Overwhelming target systems with traffic to deny service

sub_categories.name: Infrastructure Exploitation
sub_categories.description: Exploitation of SCADA/ICS systems controlling critical infrastructure
